name: Web Development (testdata1)
description:
# Custom Web Development - Modern, Fast, Built to Grow With You

We build websites and web apps that actually work for your business.

Whether you need a clean company site, an online store, a booking system, or a full custom platform, we handle everything from first concept to launch and beyond. Our stack is modern, our code is clean, and we build with performance and SEO baked in from day one.

## What We Offer

- **Custom websites and landing pages** — tailored to your brand and goals
- **E-commerce stores** — Shopify, WooCommerce, or fully custom solutions
- **Web applications and dashboards** — powerful tools built for your workflow
- **Responsive design** — flawless on every device, every time
- **Website redesigns and migrations** — breathe new life into an outdated site
- **Ongoing maintenance and support** — we don't disappear after launch

## Why Clients Stick With Us

We communicate clearly, hit deadlines, and treat your project like our own. No jargon, no surprise invoices, no templates dressed up as "custom" work.

Whether you're a startup getting off the ground or an established business that's outgrown its current site, let's talk.

---

**Free initial consultation** — no commitment, just an honest conversation about what you need and how we can help.

📩 **Get in touch today for a quote at vertexobrt@gmail.com.** (testdata1)

name: AI Setup and Consulting (testdata1)
description:
# AI Workflow Consulting — Put AI to Work Across Your Business

AI is everywhere, but most companies are still figuring out where it actually fits. That's where we come in.

We help businesses implement practical, high-impact AI workflows — not hype, not science projects, but real automations and tools that save your team hours every week.

## Our Specialty: AI for IT & Software Development

We know development inside and out, and we've built AI-powered workflows that transform how teams build software:

- **AI-assisted coding and code review** — accelerate development with intelligent pair programming
- **Automated testing and QA** — catch bugs faster with AI-driven test generation
- **Documentation generation** — turn codebases into living, up-to-date docs
- **DevOps and CI/CD optimization** — smarter deployments, fewer failures
- **Technical debt analysis** — let AI surface what needs attention before it becomes a crisis

## Beyond Development: AI Across Your Entire Operation

We also design and implement AI workflows for the teams that keep your business running:

- **Customer support** — intelligent triage, auto-responses, and AI copilots for agents
- **Administration** — automate document processing, data entry, and reporting
- **Sales & marketing** — AI-powered lead scoring, content generation, and email outreach
- **HR & recruitment** — streamline resume screening, onboarding materials, and internal Q&A
- **Knowledge management** — build internal AI assistants trained on your company's own data
- **Finance & accounting** — automated invoice processing, anomaly detection, and forecasting

## How We Work

1. **Audit** — We assess your current workflows and identify where AI delivers the biggest ROI
2. **Implement** — We set up, configure, and integrate AI tools into your existing systems
3. **Train** — We make sure your team actually knows how to use what we've built
4. **Support** — We stick around to fine-tune, troubleshoot, and expand as your needs evolve

## Why Work With Us

We're not selling you a product — we're building you a system. Every workflow is tailored to how your team actually works, using the best available tools (open-source or commercial) for the job. We speak both tech and business, so nothing gets lost in translation.

Most clients see measurable time savings within the first two weeks.

---

**Free workflow assessment** — we'll identify your top 3 AI opportunities at no cost.

📩 **Let's talk about what AI can do for your team. vertexobrt@gmail.com** (testdata1)

name: Web3 Development (testdata1)
description:
# Web3 & Crypto Development — From Smart Contracts to Full Ecosystem Delivery

Building in Web3 is hard. The stakes are high, the tech moves fast, and one bad design decision can cost millions. We've been in the trenches — shipping protocols, auditing contracts, and designing tokenomics that actually hold up under pressure.

Whether you need a single Solidity dev or an entire technical leadership team, we scale to fit your project.

## What We Build

- **Smart contracts** — secure, gas-optimized, and battle-tested on EVM chains
- **Substrate & ink! development** — custom parachains, pallets, and Polkadot-native smart contracts
- **Cross-chain bridges** — trustless and secure asset and message passing between ecosystems
- **DeFi protocols** — lending, DEXs, staking, vaults, and novel financial primitives
- **Token launches & NFT infrastructure** — from contract to mint to marketplace
- **DAOs & governance systems** — on-chain voting, treasury management, and modular governance frameworks

## Deep Expertise Where It Matters

- **Solidity & EVM** — Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, BSC, and beyond
- **Substrate & ink!** — parachain development, runtime logic, and Polkadot ecosystem tooling
- **Ecosystem design** — protocol architecture that scales without breaking
- **Incentive alignment & tokenomics** — mechanism design that drives sustainable growth, not just short-term hype
- **Security-first development** — we write code that's built to be audited, not patched after an exploit

## Flexible Engagement Models

We adapt to what your project actually needs:

- **Individual developers** — plug senior Web3 engineers directly into your existing team
- **Dedicated squads** — a full dev team embedded in your project, shipping fast
- **Fractional CTO / Technical Lead** — we take ownership of the entire technical vision and delivery, from architecture to mainnet launch
- **End-to-end project delivery** — hand us the whitepaper, we hand you the protocol. Autonomous delivery with transparent communication every step of the way

## Why Teams Choose Us

We've seen what works and what doesn't in this space. We'll tell you if your architecture won't scale, if your tokenomics have a death spiral baked in, or if there's a simpler way to get to mainnet. We're not here to bill hours — we're here to ship things that last.

We bring the same rigor to a proof-of-concept as we do to a production protocol managing real user funds.

---

**Let's talk about your project** — whether you're at whitepaper stage or mid-build and need reinforcements.

📩 **Reach out for a free technical consultation at vertexobrt@gmail.** (testdata1)

name: Market Making & Cross-Chain Arbitrage (testdata1)
description:
Your Token Deserves Real Liquidity, Not Empty Order Books

Nothing kills a promising project faster than thin liquidity. High slippage scares off traders, wide spreads signal instability, and price fragmentation across chains confuses your community. We fix all of that.

Liberstake provides professional market making and cross-chain arbitrage services designed specifically for crypto-native projects. We generate real, profitable volume — not artificial inflation — and your markets get healthier with every trade we make.

## Market Making

We deploy capital across your trading pairs on DEXs and CEXs, maintaining tight spreads and deep order books around the clock.

**What you get:**

- **Lower slippage** — your holders and traders get better execution on every swap
- **Tighter spreads** — professional-grade order books that signal a healthy, active market
- **Consistent volume** — organic, profitable trading activity that attracts more participants
- **Multi-venue coverage** — we operate across Uniswap, Raydium, Sun.io, centralized exchanges, and anywhere your token trades
- **24/7 operation** — automated infrastructure that doesn't sleep, with human oversight when it matters

## Cross-Chain Arbitrage

If your token trades on multiple chains, prices will diverge. That's not a bug — but leaving it unaddressed is a problem. We continuously monitor and close price gaps across ecosystems, keeping your token's price consistent no matter where someone buys it.

**What you get:**

- **Price stability across chains** — no more 5% discrepancies between Ethereum, Solana, and TRON
- **Connected liquidity** — fragmented pools start behaving like a unified market
- **Organic volume generation** — every arbitrage trade is a real, profitable transaction that contributes to your on-chain metrics
- **Ecosystem credibility** — consistent pricing signals maturity and builds confidence among investors and integrators

## Who This Is For

- **Token projects** looking to bootstrap or improve liquidity post-launch
- **DeFi protocols** that need stable, deep liquidity across their pools
- **Ecosystems and foundations** that want healthier markets across their chain
- **CEX-listed tokens** that need a reliable market maker with cross-venue expertise

## How We're Different

**We trade profitably or we don't trade.** Every position we take is designed to generate a return. That means you're not subsidizing fake volume — you're partnering with a firm whose incentives are aligned with your market's health. When we profit, it's because we made your market more efficient.

**No wash trading. No inflated metrics. No games.** Just real liquidity, real volume, and real price stability, being MICA compliant while achieving the same results. Magic, we know.

## Engagement Options

- **Standard market making** — we provide liquidity on agreed pairs and venues for a monthly retainer plus performance fees
- **Easy-start** — we trade profitably on your pairs, requiring no upfront USDT commitment from your project. While USDT liquidity gets to a faster start, your projects tokens are more than enough to get going.
- **Custom arrangements** — for foundations and larger ecosystems, we design bespoke liquidity strategies across multiple tokens and venues

## Getting Started

Onboarding is fast. We typically go live within days of signing, not weeks.

1. **Discovery call** — we assess your current liquidity landscape and identify gaps
2. **Proposal** — tailored strategy with clear KPIs: spread targets, volume benchmarks, slippage reduction goals
3. **Deployment** — we go live and you see results immediately
4. **Ongoing reporting** — transparent dashboards showing exactly what we're doing and how the market is responding

---

**Liberstake** — the first company on the Liberland Stock Market. Profitable from day one. Making markets better since inception.

📩 **Ready to fix your liquidity? Reach out for a free market assessment.**


[Whatsapp](https://wa.me/+385923758682)

[liberstake@gmail.com](liberstake@gmail.com) (testdata1)
